info.title: ChatWave Backend API
info.description:
Complete REST API documentation for ChatWave — a WhatsApp Business Platform with CRM, Automation, Ecommerce, Broadcasting, and Team Collaboration features.

## Authentication
- **JWT Token**: Send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
- **API Key**: Send `x-api-key: <key>` header or `Authorization: ApiKey <key>`

## Base URLs
- Local: `http://localhost:5000`
- Production: `https://api.yourdomain.com`

tags.name: Admin Dashboard
tags.description: Super admin dashboard with platform-wide analytics — total users, revenue, subscriptions.

tags.name: Admin Impersonation
tags.description: Super admin feature to impersonate user accounts for support and debugging.

tags.name: Admin Template Library
tags.description: Admin-managed template library — create pre-built templates for users to discover and use.

tags.name: Agent Management
tags.description: Manage agents (team members) — create, update, delete agents with role assignments.

tags.name: Agent Tasks
tags.description: Task management system for agents — create, assign, track, and complete tasks.

tags.name: AI Assistance
tags.description: AI-powered text generation, grammar correction, tone adjustment, and message summarization.

tags.name: AI Model Configuration
tags.description: Configure AI models (GPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) — add API keys, set defaults, test connections.

tags.name: Appointment Scheduling
tags.description: Appointment booking system — configure availability, manage bookings, send reminders.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, OTP verification, password reset, profile management, and session handling. Supports email/phone-based login with JWT tokens.

tags.name: Automated Message Bots
tags.description: Configure automated message bots triggered by events, keywords, or schedules.

tags.name: Broadcast Campaigns
tags.description: Create and schedule broadcast campaigns to send bulk WhatsApp messages to contact segments.

tags.name: Business Working Hours
tags.description: Configure business working hours per WABA — auto-reply outside hours.

tags.name: Campaign Analytics
tags.description: Detailed campaign performance analytics — delivery rates, read rates, response rates.

tags.name: Chat Management
tags.description: Internal chat management — notes, assignments, bulk operations, and conversation metadata.

tags.name: Chat Widgets
tags.description: Configure embeddable chat widgets for websites — appearance, behavior, and phone number assignment.

tags.name: Chatbot Configuration
tags.description: Configure keyword-triggered chatbots with automated responses and conversation flows.

tags.name: CMS Pages
tags.description: Content Management System — create and manage custom pages (Privacy Policy, Terms, etc.).

tags.name: Contact Directory
tags.description: Complete contact management — CRUD, import/export, bulk operations, tagging, and custom fields.

tags.name: Contact Import Jobs
tags.description: Bulk import contacts from CSV/Excel files — track import progress and handle duplicates.

tags.name: Contact Inquiries
tags.description: Manage customer inquiries submitted through the contact form on the public landing page.

tags.name: Contact Segments
tags.description: Create dynamic and static contact segments based on filters and conditions.

tags.name: Contact Tags
tags.description: Tag system for organizing and segmenting contacts with color-coded labels.

tags.name: Currency Management
tags.description: Manage supported currencies — add, toggle active/default, conversion rates.

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: Define custom data fields for contacts — text, number, date, dropdown, checkbox types.

tags.name: Dashboard Analytics
tags.description: Main dashboard with key metrics — conversations, contacts, revenue, growth charts.

tags.name: Developer API Keys
tags.description: Generate and manage API keys for programmatic access to the ChatWave API.

tags.name: Ecommerce Webhooks
tags.description: Configure webhooks for ecommerce platform integrations (Shopify, WooCommerce, etc.).

tags.name: Facebook Ads
tags.description: Create and manage Click-to-WhatsApp ad campaigns — campaigns, ad sets, ads, and insights.

tags.name: Facebook Integration
tags.description: Connect Facebook pages, manage WABA setup via Facebook Business Manager.

tags.name: Facebook Lead Forms
tags.description: Connect Facebook lead generation forms to automatically capture leads into contacts.

tags.name: FAQ Management
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete frequently asked questions for the landing page and help center.

tags.name: File Attachments
tags.description: Upload and manage file attachments — images, documents, audio, video for messages.

tags.name: Form Submissions
tags.description: View and manage form submission data — analytics, status tracking, and export.

tags.name: Google Integration
tags.description: Google OAuth integration — Calendar sync, Google Sheets import/export.

tags.name: Kanban / Pipeline Funnels
tags.description: Visual Kanban boards for sales pipelines — stages, items, drag-and-drop management.

tags.name: Landing Page Builder
tags.description: Configure the public landing page — hero section, features, pricing, testimonials, footer.

tags.name: Language & Translations
tags.description: Multi-language support — manage languages, edit translation keys, toggle active languages.

tags.name: Message Delivery Status
tags.description: Track message delivery, read receipts, and failure status for sent messages.

tags.name: Message Sequences
tags.description: Automated message sequences — define multi-step follow-up campaigns with delays.

tags.name: Message Templates
tags.description: WhatsApp message template management — create, sync with Meta, submit for approval, and manage template library.

tags.name: Order Management
tags.description: Track and manage ecommerce orders received through WhatsApp — status updates and analytics.

tags.name: Payment Gateway Setup
tags.description: Configure payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay, PayPal) — API keys, webhooks, testing.

tags.name: Payment Webhooks
tags.description: Receive and process payment event webhooks from Stripe, Razorpay, and PayPal.

tags.name: Product Catalogs
tags.description: Manage product catalogs synced with WhatsApp Commerce — products, categories, and inventory.

tags.name: Quick Replies
tags.description: Create and manage quick reply templates for fast message responses. Includes favorites.

tags.name: Reply Materials Library
tags.description: Manage reusable reply materials — images, documents, audio clips for quick message composition.

tags.name: Roles & Permissions
tags.description: Role-based access control — create roles, assign granular permissions.

tags.name: Short Links
tags.description: Create trackable short links for WhatsApp click-to-chat — analytics and redirection.

tags.name: Subscription Plans
tags.description: Define and manage subscription plans with features, limits, pricing, and trial periods.

tags.name: System
tags.description: System

tags.name: System Settings
tags.description: Global application settings — branding, SMTP, WhatsApp config, feature toggles.

tags.name: Tax Configuration
tags.description: Configure tax rates for subscription billing — GST, VAT, sales tax.

tags.name: Team Management
tags.description: Create and manage teams/departments — assign agents, set team-level permissions.

tags.name: Testimonials
tags.description: Manage customer testimonials displayed on the landing page. Includes CRUD operations and status toggling.

tags.name: User Management
tags.description: Admin user management — create staff accounts, assign roles, reset passwords.

tags.name: User Preferences
tags.description: Per-user settings — notification preferences, chat appearance, background images.

tags.name: User Subscriptions
tags.description: Full subscription lifecycle — create, cancel, resume, change plans, process payments (Stripe/Razorpay/PayPal/Manual).

tags.name: WABA Configuration
tags.description: WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) level configuration — webhook URLs, business profile.

tags.name: WhatsApp Business Calling
tags.description: WhatsApp Business Calling features — agent management, call routing, call logs, and recordings.

tags.name: WhatsApp Connections (Legacy)
tags.description: Legacy WhatsApp connection management using direct API integration.

tags.name: WhatsApp Form Builder
tags.description: Build interactive WhatsApp forms using Meta Flows API — create, publish, and track responses.

tags.name: WhatsApp Messaging
tags.description: Core WhatsApp messaging functionality — send messages, manage chats, view conversations, connect WhatsApp accounts via Cloud API or Baileys.

tags.name: WhatsApp Webhooks
tags.description: WhatsApp Webhooks

tags.name: Workflow Automation
tags.description: Visual workflow automation builder — create triggers, conditions, and actions for automated messaging.

tags.name: Workspace Management
tags.description: Multi-workspace support — create, switch, and manage separate business workspaces.
